title: image platform mismatch is not written in english :)
body:
```
podman run jbangdev/jbang-action
WARNING: image platform ({amd64 linux  [] }) does not match the expected platform ({arm64 linux  [] })
```

I assume `{amd64 linux  [] }` is like an array dump?

I would have expected something like:

```
podman run jbangdev/jbang-action
WARNING: image platform (amd64/linux) does not match the expected platform (arm64/linux})
```

comments.body:
Thanks for opening the issue!

I opened https://github.com/containers/common/pull/1218 to fix the issue.
